subject: fix(audit): address 5 code audit findings — race conditions, data safety, defensive coding
body:
1. ExportButtons: Add ref-based mutex (exportLockRef) to prevent concurrent
   exports. React state batching delays the disabled prop, allowing rapid
   clicks to fire two handlers that both modify canvas transform/opacity.
   Lock is checked synchronously at handler entry, released in finally.

2. useAdState loadDesign: Filter page data to PAGE_FIELDS before spreading
   into state. Saved designs from older versions may contain orphaned fields
   that would permanently pollute state if spread without filtering.

3. useAdState extractPageData: Wrap structuredClone in try/catch with JSON
   round-trip fallback. Prevents page swap crashes if non-cloneable data
   (DOM refs, Blobs) leaks into state.

4. cellUtils cleanupOrphanedCells: Add NaN guard to parseInt and extract
   shared pruneOrphanedKeys helper. Non-numeric keys from corrupted state
   silently survived cleanup across all 5 cell-indexed data structures.

5. debugLog: Guard global error/unhandledrejection listeners with window
   flag to prevent accumulation during Vite HMR reloads.

Tags: audit, race-condition, data-safety, defensive-coding, hmr
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
Semver: patch
